_note: Snapshot of examples from TheThingsNetwork/lorawan-devices vendor/milesight-iot/em500-smtc-codec.yaml (Apache-2.0). Authoring reference only; excluded from the npm tarball. The upstream example `output` is MISSING conductivity even though the wire (bytes 10-13: channel 0x05/0x7F) carries it — a documented upstream index-advance bug that our codec fixes.

examples.description: Soil Moisture, Temperature, Electrical Conductivity Sensor (example 1) - Milesight IoT
